nasb.text: I will give the men who have transgressed My covenant, who have not fulfilled the words of the covenant which they made before Me, when they cut the calf in two and passed between its parts—

esv.text: And the men who transgressed my covenant and did not keep the terms of the covenant that they made before me, I will make them like  the calf that they cut in two and passed between its parts—

cnv.text: ‘我必把那些違犯我的約的人交出去；他們沒有履行在我面前和我立約的誓言，就是他們把牛犢劈開兩半，並且從兩半中間走過去時立下的。
